programme.title: The Hub With Wang Guan
programme.desc: The Hub with Wang Guan covers hot-button geopolitical and economic issues, as well as interesting stories and trends in culture, education, technology and lifestyle. It aims to connect people, cultures and societies across the East and the West. The program features dynamic designs, fast pace and rich visuals to keep viewers engaged. It also makes use of trending topics online, while focusing on what’s relevant in China and the world.

programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.title: Tutti Convocati

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Air India 182 scompare improvvisamente dal radar.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Una delle collisioni aeree più terrificanti della storia avviene sopra l’India nel 1996.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un traghetto greco si schianta contro una gigantesca roccia.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: I piloti riescono a compiere uno degli atterraggi più straordinari della storia.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Partnair 394 è in crociera a 22.000 piedi quando inizia improvvisamente a precipitare verso il mare.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un piccolo problema meccanico si trasforma rapidamente in un’emergenza totale.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un Airbus Air France con a bordo 180 persone è stato dirottato da quattro terroristi poco prima del decollo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo TAM Airlines 3054 sfreccia lungo la pista ad alta velocità e si schianta.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Flash Airlines 604 si schianta nel Mar Rosso pochi minuti dopo il decollo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Una rivisitazione di cinque disastri aerei fondamentali e dei cambiamenti che hanno provocato.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un Boeing 767 si schianta nell’Oceano Atlantico, uccidendo tutte le 217 persone a bordo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Arrow Air 1285 fa rifornimento e pochi secondi dopo il decollo si schianta.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il motore destro del volo Tuninter 1153 si guasta improvvisamente.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un forte tonfo proviene dalla fusoliera e i piloti interrompono il decollo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Air France 358 prende fuoco quando esce di pista.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un aereo gira misteriosamente intorno all’aeroporto di Atene. Qual è l’enigma del volo 522?

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Due aerei si scontrano in volo e si schiantano in una tranquilla periferia di Los Angeles.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Korean Air Cargo 8509 si schianta in un campo a nord-est di Londra.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Uno dei disastri più allarmanti nella storia dell’aviazione.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un treno merci che attraversa la periferia deraglia e si schianta.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Otto giocatori del Manchester United muoiono in un noto incidente aereo a Monaco.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un comandante lotta per mantenere l’aereo in volo e improvvisamente precipita verso il suolo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo FedEx 705 ha appena terminato la fase di salita da Memphis quando inizia l’attacco.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: “Fatti a Pezzi” ripercorre alcuni dei più spettacolari disastri aerei.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Pochi secondi dopo il decollo, i motori iniziano a emettere una serie di forti boati in rapida successione.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Durante il trasferimento di bimbi vietnamiti orfani da Saigon verso la salvezza, tutto va terribilmente storto

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: È esplosa una bomba e l’aereo ha subito gravi danni.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: “Chi sta Pilotando l’Aereo?” rivisita alcuni dei più inquietanti disastri aerei.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Partnair 394 è in crociera a 22.000 piedi quando inizia improvvisamente a precipitare verso il mare.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il racconto dello schianto del volo American Eagle 4184 vicino a Roselawn, Indiana.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Delta Airlines 191 raggiunge la soglia dell’aeroporto di Dallas Fort Worth.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un jet privato viene scosso da un violento impatto sopra la foresta amazzonica.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Durante il trasferimento di bimbi vietnamiti orfani da Saigon verso la salvezza, tutto va terribilmente storto

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo China Airlines 611 scompare improvvisamente dal radar.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un piccolo aereo pendolare, il volo Air Midwest 5481, è in un breve tragitto quando si verifica il disastro.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: “Fatti a Pezzi” ripercorre alcuni dei più spettacolari disastri aerei.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il motore destro del volo Tuninter 1153 si guasta improvvisamente.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Adam Air 574 entra in una tempesta e si schianta in mare.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Pochi istanti dopo il decollo, i piloti del volo Birgenair 301 vengono bombardati da allarmi confusi.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Per trovare la causa dello schianto del volo South African Airlines 295, dovettero scavare a fondo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Southern Airways 242 entra in una violenta tempesta.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: “Difetto Fatale” rivisita alcuni dei più inquietanti disastri aerei.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Uno dei disastri più allarmanti nella storia dell’aviazione.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo 401 ha tre luci verdi che confermano il carrello bloccato, ma ne funzionano solo due.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Rivivi l’incredibile storia di un pilota costretto a far planare in sicurezza un 767 senza motori.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Air India 182 scompare improvvisamente dal radar.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Una delle collisioni aeree più terrificanti della storia avviene sopra l’India nel 1996.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Pan Am 103 esplode improvvisamente nei cieli sopra Lockerbie, in Scozia.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un forte tonfo proviene dalla fusoliera e i piloti interrompono il decollo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un comandante lotta per mantenere l’aereo in volo e improvvisamente precipita verso il suolo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo United Airlines 232 subisce un grave guasto quando uno dei motori esplode.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Una rivisitazione di cinque disastri aerei fondamentali e dei cambiamenti che hanno provocato.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo TAM Airlines 3054 sfreccia lungo la pista ad alta velocità e si schianta.

programme.title: Pixel Collage
programme.desc: A well-crafted collage of selected short documentaries telling stories about all aspects of China! People, technology, culture, and wildlife, all are showcased in Internet-friendly form.

programme.title: Today’s Top Pick
programme.desc: Documentaries in this slot are rebroadcasts of our most-viewed and most popular stories of the season. They feature important social, economic, environmental or other policy-driven issues, affecting lives nationwide or simply in one small village. A broad selection of top productions by Chinese top documentary producers.

programme.title: Humanities and Geography
programme.desc: A strand devoted to the nature and wildlife of China, the people who lived alongside them, and the great and diverse landscapes with which they all contend.

programme.title: Living China
programme.desc: Real life stories told from the personal perspective. Moving, dramatic, sorrows and joys, expressed emphatically and expressed quietly. Watch closely to see and understand the real China as it is lived.

programme.title: Special Edition
programme.desc: Prestige Chinese documentary production, tackling serious subjects with the best cinematography, editing, and all round production values with a unique Chinese perspective.

programme.title: Journeys and Discoveries
programme.desc: A documentary series showcasing the history of China and its people.

programme.title: History in the Frame
programme.desc: A documentary series featuring historical and archaeological exploration.

programme.title: Best Eats
programme.desc: Food connects people! A feast for the eyes that spotlights the cuisines of China in a way that’s bound to set the mouths of the whole globe watering!

programme.title: Youthful China
programme.desc: The youth of a country is the future of that country. A series of documentaries focusing on the younger generation of China in which you get to see what they are achieving and what makes them tick!

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S04:E03 - Alaska Caribou
programme.desc: Deep into unexplored territory, Laramy hunts the Alaskan frontier in search of caribou. But with a hungry grizzly on his trail, will his single-shot Hawken rifle be enough to protect him?

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S04:E04 - Colorado Elk
programme.desc: Elk calls echo through the mountains where Laramy is hunting. As night falls, Laramy gets within shooting range of a huge Elk.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S04:E05 - Mountain Lion
programme.desc: Laramy is chasing big cats with hounds over the ridges, down the slopes and into the trees.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S04:E06 - Trapping Show
programme.desc: Laramy honors the history of the mountain man by trapping for beaver in the lower rockies.

programme.title: Survive the Wild - S01:E02 - Nature's World Wide Web
programme.desc: When animals share info to help each other decide, it's called animal communication. They use stuff like sounds, colors, body language, movements, electric signs, touches, smells, or a mix of these. Whether it's a sea anemone spreading its tentacles or a male lion considering approaching a mate, their skill in communicating can be vital for their success. This episode dives into how animals interact with one another.

programme.title: Survive the Wild - S01:E03 - Cunning Copulation
programme.desc: Finding a mate, building a nest, and raising kids are all part of the whole reproductive behavior thing. But it’s not as easy as it sounds. First, you’ve got to sift through lots of possible partners to find the one with the best genes to keep your family line going. Nesting involves finding some space and then guarding it fiercely, while raising the little ones takes loads of energy as you have to feed, teach, and keep them safe until they grow up. This episode dives into the ins and outs of how creatures go about their reproductive business.

programme.title: Carter's W.A.R. - S01:E04 - No Win Scenario
programme.desc: Ivan Carter investigates a tragic croc attack on Africa's Zambezi River.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S01:E08 - Naturally Raw
programme.desc: This episode begins in Costa Rica, in an amazing rain forest. Here they make delicious chocolate out of cocoa beans. Mother Nature is at her magnificent best – showcasing hundreds of plant and animal species. And then to Kenya where green monkeys will be our tour-guides in the Lost City of Gedi plus a closer look at the wildlife which lives in very close proximity to the bustling streets of Nairobi.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S01:E09 - Naturally Invigorating
programme.desc: Iceland: home to volcanic lakes and hot springs and mono-chromatic vistas. And then to Laos in South East Asia with its lush jungles, underground caves and water buffalo along the Mekong River.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S01:E10 - Naturally Potent
programme.desc: Explore the unspoilt mountains of Lapland and on to the pristine Swiss Alps. In contrast we then travel to Champagne Province in France - home of the finest wines in the world. Finally, Gibraltar beckons with its long history and strange mysterious caves.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S01:E11 - Naturally Different
programme.desc: The Shetland Islands: home to 20,000 humans, one million birds and the smallest horse in the world. Then on to an area known to the locals as the Centre of the World in South Eastern province of Kazakhstan. From there we will go to the Yellow Mountains in Central China often called The Venice of China.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E35 - Prince Charles At 50 Heir To Sadness
programme.desc: After Diana's death, everyone's attention turned to Charles, who was not only a widower and a dad but also next in line for the throne. This show takes a closer look at how he got along with his sons, his longtime love Camilla, and what his future might look like as King. Royal experts David Starkey and Anthony Holden share their insights.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan: A Very Modern Romance
programme.desc: Meghan Markle and Prince Harry share similar interests and seem like a perfect match. Both have faced tough times growing up but have come out on top. Now they're winning together. This hour-long special, featuring a chat with author Andrew Morton, explores the social backdrop that makes their bold marriage fit right in with today's British Royal Family.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild - S01:E01 - Alpine Ghosts
programme.desc: Mario takes on the unforgiving alpine mountains of the south island of New Zealand in a fallow deer hunt with his bow, and cooks an impressive venison pie dish.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild - S01:E02 - Deadly Outback
programme.desc: In the outback of Australia where everything is trying to kill you. It's monsoon season when no one attempts to roam around with salt water crocodiles lurking. Mario links up with a long time friend in search of a wild Buffalo.

programme.title: Wardens - S06:E04 - Under Fire
programme.desc: The drought conditions in Montana U.S.A. threaten to close down hunting and fishing in the Treasure State. But, dead fish and restrictions are the least of the Wardens worries when the bears come to town.

programme.title: Wardens - S06:E05 - False Witness
programme.desc: Block Management is one of the keys to great hunting in Montana U.S.A. but the rules are set. If you are going to break them, the Wardens will be there to hold you accountable.

programme.title: Alaska's Wild Gourmet - S01:E04 - Celebration
programme.desc: Another 5 Star meal from the Ewing Family. This time it is a dinner for some local natives. Bradley decides to go on a hunt for a goat for the first course of slow braised goat ragout, followed by a fish risotto, and for the main course - curried goat with apple and rose hip chutney and to complete the dinner a chocolate molten lava cake for desert.

programme.title: Alaska's Wild Gourmet - S01:E05 - Fisherman's Catch
programme.desc: Bradley is looking to give a group of fishermen an unusual dinner - something totally unexpected. On the menu: sea snails followed by an ambitious sea cucumber dish and for the main course a Dungeness Crab Risotto.

programme.title: Gold Fever - S20:E11 - Prospectors and Miners
programme.desc: It's a big year for the Cripple River mining camp in Nome Alaska. The crew is extremely busy and the participants are already finding some of the biggest gold in recent history.

programme.title: Gold Fever - S20:E12 - One Dredge: Tons of Gold
programme.desc: Tom's been dredging a spot on Arctic creek for the past couple years. Now is the time he and Kia are gonna open the hole up in hopes of finding some serious gold.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E34 - Prince William And Prince Harry The Next Royal Generation
programme.desc: Prince William and Prince Harry, along with their friends, got as much media attention as today’s pop stars, fashion icons, and movie celebs. This documentary explores how this affected their personal lives and friendships, showcasing how they managed their fame alongside their royal responsibilities.

programme.desc: Prince William and Prince Harry, along with their friends, got as much media attention as today’s pop stars, fashion icons, and movie celebs. This documentary explores how this affected their personal lives and friendships, showcasing how they managed their fame alongside their royal responsibilities.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E35 - Prince Charles At 50 Heir To Sadness
programme.desc: After Diana's death, everyone's attention turned to Charles, who was not only a widower and a dad but also next in line for the throne. This show takes a closer look at how he got along with his sons, his longtime love Camilla, and what his future might look like as King. Royal experts David Starkey and Anthony Holden share their insights.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan: A Very Modern Romance
programme.desc: Meghan Markle and Prince Harry share similar interests and seem like a perfect match. Both have faced tough times growing up but have come out on top. Now they're winning together. This hour-long special, featuring a chat with author Andrew Morton, explores the social backdrop that makes their bold marriage fit right in with today's British Royal Family.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild - S01:E01 - Alpine Ghosts
programme.desc: Mario takes on the unforgiving alpine mountains of the south island of New Zealand in a fallow deer hunt with his bow, and cooks an impressive venison pie dish.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild - S01:E02 - Deadly Outback
programme.desc: In the outback of Australia where everything is trying to kill you. It's monsoon season when no one attempts to roam around with salt water crocodiles lurking. Mario links up with a long time friend in search of a wild Buffalo.

programme.title: Wardens - S06:E04 - Under Fire
programme.desc: The drought conditions in Montana U.S.A. threaten to close down hunting and fishing in the Treasure State. But, dead fish and restrictions are the least of the Wardens worries when the bears come to town.

programme.title: Wardens - S06:E05 - False Witness
programme.desc: Block Management is one of the keys to great hunting in Montana U.S.A. but the rules are set. If you are going to break them, the Wardens will be there to hold you accountable.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E41 - Fergie The Downfall Of A Modern Duchess
programme.desc: Sarah Ferguson, once known as the Duchess of York, seemed to have everything, but her world turned upside down when her name got caught up in a big scandal.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E42 - Diana A Model Princess
programme.desc: Diana's fashion sense was something people often looked at closely. She had a knack for picking outfits that were both stylish and sophisticated, which always grabbed attention. Her hats were another standout feature; she often wore elegant designs that added a touch of grace to her look. Her hair was also iconic, usually styled neatly with a slight bounce, perfectly framing her face and adding to her elegant appearance.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild - S01:E03 - Up with the Gods - Himalayan Tahr
programme.desc: Mario teams up with good friend and precision rifle expert Bernard and heads into the high alpine mountains above New Zealand's rugged West Coast. Drawing on his Greek roots, Mario cooks a rustic Kleftiko dish in an earth oven.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild - S01:E04 - Outback Odyssey
programme.desc: In one of the harshest environments on the planet, Mario travels to the outback desert of Australia in search of feral camels that have been running rampant. What seemingly feels to be a a simple task quickly turns into one of the hardest and most unexpected challenges he has taken on. With a bow in hand and scorching heat he explores the great dividing range, in hope of harvesting one of these middle eastern based beasts.

programme.title: Wardens - S06:E06 - Frozen Fire
programme.desc: When a report of an illegal buck surfaces, Warden Joe Kambic goes to work to find the shooters. Things heat up for Warden Rick Smauch when he responds to a fire; and Bryan Golie fights the winter weather just to patrol his area.

programme.title: Wardens - S06:E07 - River Rescue
programme.desc: Drownings happen every Summer on the lakes and rivers of Montana U.S.A. Region 1 Warden Chris Crane steps in to save a person in a kayak, while Region 2 Wardens catch friends fishing in the wrong spot.

programme.title: Alaska's Wild Gourmet - S01:E06 - Alutiq Anniversary
programme.desc: It's Game On for the Ewing Family as they plan a dinner to celebrate the 20th Anniversary of the AlutIq Museum. On the menu: clam fritters with kelp, kelp with rhubarb and cranberry jam, game meat with horse-radish mash potatoes with mushrooms, asparagus and leeks. The challenge is on to produce a memorable dinner from local ingredients for the Alutiq people and presenting it in a way that they have never had it before.

programme.title: Alaska's Wild Gourmet - S01:E07 - Bush Pilot's Birthday
programme.desc: A Bush Pilot's Birthday warrants a treat of a menu with pacific spot prawns and pasta to kick off this episode's menu followed by duck breast with celery root and for the main course there is rabbit and carrots.

programme.title: Gold Fever - S21:E01 - The Golden Gauntlet
programme.desc: Kia challenges Tom to a competition, whoever finds the most gold with one tank of gas wins - winner takes all! kwadventure

programme.title: Gold Fever - S21:E02 - Omilak Silver Mine
programme.desc: Tom and Kia helicopter into the Alaska wilderness to check out an old mysterious silver mine the buzzard left them.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E44 - 50 Glorious Years A Royal Celebration
programme.desc: Honoring 50 years of marriage between Her Majesty the Queen and her husband, Prince Philip of Greece and Denmark, the Duke of Edinburgh.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E41 - Fergie The Downfall Of A Modern Duchess
programme.desc: Sarah Ferguson, once known as the Duchess of York, seemed to have everything, but her world turned upside down when her name got caught up in a big scandal.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Il corpo di una giovane attraente fu trovato a un miglio dalla sua auto abbandonata. La polizia si allarmò particolarmente quando si rese conto che la vittima era venuta da loro per aiuto solo due settimane prima dopo un evento di rabbia al volante.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La scena del delitto era piuttosto violenta: marito e moglie erano stati colpiti a morte in camera da letto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1984, il corpo dell'universitaria Laura Salmon fu trovato in una fattoria del Middle Tennessee, coperto dai suoi jeans e dai jeans dell'assassino.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La vittima venne pugnalata più di cento volte, lasciando la sua camera da letto intrisa di sangue. Anche se il suo corpo era posizionato in modo suggestivo, non era stata violentata. È stato un crimine sessuale o è stato un atto di violenza casuale?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Negli anni '90, i media soprannominarono Richard Rogers il "Killer dell'Ultima Chiamata" perché prendeva di mira nei locali gay uomini che erano evidentemente ubriachi.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La polizia ricava un indizio su una coppia scomparsa nel weekend del Memorial Day durante una rapina in corso. Le prove trovate risolvono un crimine brutale.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1989, i cadaveri di Joan Rogers e delle due figlie adolescenti furono trovati a galleggiare a Tampa Bay.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In poco più di un mese due donne che vivevano nello stesso complesso residenziale furono brutalmente uccise. Le analogie delle scene del crimine portarono la polizia a pensare si trattasse di un serial killer che covava un forte odio verso le donne.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Una vacanza in famiglia si trasforma in un incubo quando la moglie viene rinvenuta a faccia in giù nel lago.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Detectives search for the bombers of two churches in Illinois, hoping that the materials used in the remnants of the handmade bombs will offer the clues to catch the culprits.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In un tragico scherzo del destino, pochi giorni dopo che la donna vendette casa e si traslocò in un umile caravan, un incendio le tolse sia il caravan che la vita. Ma l'autopsia dimostrò che non fu un incidente.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Un chirurgo viene colpito a morte e il sospettato principale viene visto al ristorante al momento del delitto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1993, la giovane madre Tammy Tatum fu trovata violentata e uccisa nel suo appartamento di Longmont, in Colorado. La polizia inizialmente sospettò del suo ex marito, ma non aveva prove sufficienti per accusarlo e il caso è rimasto irrisolto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La vittima è stata pugnalata più di trenta volte e la scena del crimine è piena del suo sangue. Vicino alla sua testa, la polizia scopre un caratteristico bottone con pezzi di filo ancora attaccati.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2000, il capocantiere Darrell North fu trovato morto nel suo rimorchio a Ft. Vale, Texas. Quando gli inquirenti arrivarono, scoprirono che era stato accoltellato 46 volte, rivelando un rapporto personale tra la vittima e l'aggressore.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Una donna fu brutalmente uccisa nella sua casa e gli unici testimoni del delitto erano i cani di famiglia. Un esperto di comportamento canino era certo che il killer conoscesse sia la vittima che gli animali e deciso a capire cosa videro i cani.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1996, la polizia di Virginia Beach arrivò nell'appartamento di Makdessi e trovò Elise Makdessi e il suo amante Quincy Brown morti.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: L'assassino probabilmente sperava di coprire le proprie tracce inscenando la scena del crimine. Ma gli investigatori hanno visto il tentativo quasi subito e si sono rivolti alla scienza forense per scoprire cosa è realmente accaduto quella notte.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Il 20 maggio 2001, Carrie Nelson, allora ventenne, è stata picchiata a morte mentre lavorava da sola in un ufficio del parco.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Due sospetti che convivono sono stati collegati a un omicidio per stivali macchiati di sangue e una pistola.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La donna sul retro del camion agitava le braccia e urlava. Pensavano stesse facendo qualcosa di pericoloso per il gusto di farlo. Ma quando trovarono una giacca vicino a una pozza di sangue, capirono che ciò che avevano visto non era una scorribanda.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando un'insegnante devota e rispettata scomparve, la polizia dovette determinare se fosse andata in vacanza senza dirlo a nessuno o se fosse stata vittima di un crimine.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2003, Jason MacLennan tornò a casa e trovò il corpo di suo padre Ken disteso in una pozza di sangue.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Una donna viene uccisa in un parcheggio affollato in pieno giorno. Sembra un colpo da professionisti, ma le prove rivelano un piano elaborato.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: A seguito della morte improvvisa di una donna attenta alla salute, iniziano le indagini sulle possibili cause.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: A mysterious murder in an upscale community is solved by mobile phone forensics, after chasing a main suspect's whereabouts.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: A suitcase leads to the gruesome discovery of a nearly perfect crime, leaving investigators feeling confused.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: I detective sono decisi a fare tutto il possibile per catturare uno stupratore e assassino. Usano una prova cruciale: un'impronta del palmo.

programme.title: Forensic Files II

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Quando un marine di 23 anni muore nella sua stanza, i dottori credono che sia stato un attacco di cuore. Ma dopo aver trovato l'arsenico negli organi, sua moglie viene accusata di omicidio. Un avvocato scaltro e test tossicologici scoprono la verità.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Gli investigatori pensano di sapere chi ha ucciso una donna, ma la nuova tecnologia forense capovolge il caso.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Dopo aver sparato alla testa delle vittime, l'assassino ha inscenato la scena del crimine, ha messo le prove incriminanti in un sacchetto di plastica e le ha gettate nel fiume.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2006, Darlene VanderGiesen ricevette e-mail minacciose e poi scomparve. Il monitoraggio della fonte delle e-mail portò la polizia a casa di Daphne Wright, dove credono sia stato commesso un omicidio.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando una studentessa universitaria risulta scomparsa, la polizia crede che l'indagine sarà come tante altre. Ma quando scoprono schizzi di sangue nella camera da letto del suo ragazzo, capiscono che questo caso sarà diverso.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.desc: Have fun with Baby Shark and the Shark Family!

programme.title: The Shark Family's Teeth Hurt!
programme.desc: Oh no! Mommy Shark has cavities, Daddy Shark has a broken tooth, and Big Brother Shark’s teeth have turned yellow! Doctor Baby Shark and friends are here to help make them healthy again!

programme.title: Baby Shark: I Love You Super-Duper!
programme.desc: I love you, I love you, I love you! Let’s share Baby Shark’s love for family! Sing along and count from one to ten together!

programme.title: Boo and Mandoo
programme.desc: Meet Boo the cat and Mandoo the puppy! They’re always bickering—but can they become friends? Maybe a game of ball will bring them closer!

programme.title: We Are Firefighters
programme.desc: Today, we’re firefighters! Join Firefighter Pinkfong and learn what firefighters do. Emergency call! Let’s go!

programme.title: Hoi's Playground
programme.desc: Pinkfong and Baby Shark's awesome friend, Hoi, is back! With him, you'll find lots of fun songs and games! Let's have some fun with Hoi!

programme.title: Pinkfong Car Mechanic
programme.desc: Welcome to the Pinkfong Repair Shop. Feel free to drop by!

programme.title: Pinkfong Super Rescue Team
programme.desc: Hoi Poi Pinkfong! Pinkfong joins the Super Rescue Team! Join Pinkfong and the Super Rescue Team to solve all the cases happening in the city and learn essential safety tips along the way.

programme.title: Hide 'n Seek with Shark Family 4
programme.desc: Oh? Where did Baby Shark and Shark Family go? Help Pinkfong to find all the Shark Family!

programme.title: Il mio piccolo dinosauro
programme.desc: Il giovane Jake cresce in un borgo dove non accade mai nulla di eccitante. Un giorno il ragazzino si ritrova in camera un piccolo dinosauro blu che diventa il suo nuovo meraviglioso amico.

programme.title: Barbie: Dreamtopia
programme.desc: La sorella più giovane di Barbie, Chelsea, viene iscritta a una gara di biciclette locale dalla sua amica, ma si sente imbarazzata perché non riesce a pedalare senza le rotelle.

programme.title: Russell Madness - Wrestler a 4 Zampe
programme.desc: Per Russell, un'adorabile terrier, la famiglia significa tutto e farà di tutto per trovarne una – anche salire su un ring e sfidare il campione in carica!

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia: Festival of Fun
programme.desc: Unitevi a Barbie e alla sua sorellina Chelsea nel meraviglioso viaggio attraverso il magico mondo di Dreamtopia, una nuova e speciale avventura animata!

programme.title: Arthur e il popolo dei Minimei
programme.desc: Come un qualsiasi altro bambino di 10 anni, Arthur è affascinato dalle storie che sua nonna gli racconta prima di dormire. I suoi sogni sono popolati dalle tribù africane e dalle incredibili altre invenzioni descritte su un vecchio libro che apparteneva a suo nonno, misteriosamente scomparso.

programme.title: La Mia Prima Barbie: Felice Giorno da Sogno
programme.desc: Canta insieme a Barbie, Barbie, Teresa e Renee in questa avventura musicale mentre pianificano la più grande festa di compleanno a sorpresa di sempre per la sorella di Barbie, Chelsea. "Più grande di UN SEMPLICE compleanno, dobbiamo pianificare un GIORNO DA SOGNO!"

programme.title: Il viaggio di Norm
programme.desc: Norm, un orso bianco vegano e ballerino con la straordinaria capacità di parlare la lingua umana, deve lasciare il Polo Nord per raggiungere New York e fermare lo spietato costruttore Sig.

programme.title: Spirito selvaggio
programme.desc: Kacie, una ragazza dallo spirito ribelle, trova uno spirito affine in Blaze, un cavallo da corsa che si rifiuta di essere addomesticato.

programme.title: Alieni in soffitta
programme.desc: È tempo di vacanze estive per la famiglia Pearson. Cala la notte e improvvisamente quattro oggetti luminosi si dirigono verso il tetto. Un gruppo di alieni è alla conquista della casa.

programme.title: Barbie: Dreamtopia
programme.desc: La sorella più giovane di Barbie, Chelsea, viene iscritta a una gara di biciclette locale dalla sua amica, ma si sente imbarazzata perché non riesce a pedalare senza le rotelle.

programme.title: Il cane pompiere
programme.desc: Il cagnolino più coccolato di Hollywood si perde durante le riprese di una pubblicità e finisce per diventare la mascotte di una caserma dei pompieri locale.

programme.title: Ploi
programme.desc: Ploi è un pulcino di piviere che ha paura a spiccare il volo.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Miss Pink, una venditrice ambulante, si ferma al villaggio, e Navirou si innamora della sua assistente Felyne, Mocha. Quanto oltre si spingerà in nome dell'amore?

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Dan dubita di essere adatto a fare l'allenatore degli aspirati Rider e ripensa al suo vecchio amico Silva, che è sempre stato il migliore in tutto.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Al villaggio arriva un pessimo presagio, il vento solitamente benevolo diventa violento. Hyoro fatica a non deludere le aspettative del suo esigente fratello Genie.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Lidia conduce i suoi amici nella sua foresta per indagare sui sinistri cambiamenti che stanno avvenendo. Lì scopriranno la storia di un leggendario Rider e della famiglia di Lute.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Un Nargacuga infettato dal Flagello Nero attacca il villaggio, lasciando una scia di distruzione, mentre i Rider giovani e anziani fanno il possibile per respingerlo.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Non c'è tempo per rimettere a posto dopo l'attacco del Nargacuga, dato che potrebbe riattaccare il villaggio da un momento all'altro. Cheval giura vendetta e prende un nuovo Monstie.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: I Rider apprendisti vanno via da soli per affrontare il Nargacuga colpito dal Flagello Nero, ma sarà difficile perché il Monstie di Lute è rimasto a casa per riprendersi…

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: È giunto il momento per i giovani Rider di avventurarsi fuori dal Villaggio di Hakum, e questo viaggio è accompagnato da emozione, responsabilità e non poca trepidazione

programme.title: Il fantastico mondo di Aladino
programme.desc: Calvin, un giovane commesso della pizza a domicilio, viene portato nella Bagdad dell'ottavo secolo grazie al Genio della lampada. Qui, con l'aiuto di Alì Babà e della principessa Sherazade, recupererà la lampada di Aladino.

programme.title: Gli acchiappamostri
programme.desc: Un’avventura soprannaturale per tutta la famiglia. Alex vuole aiutare il suo fratellino a smettere di avere incubi, quindi decide di formare una squadra per prendersi cura dei suoi mostri immaginari.

programme.title: Il viaggio di Norm
programme.desc: Norm, un orso bianco vegano e ballerino con la straordinaria capacità di parlare la lingua umana, deve lasciare il Polo Nord per raggiungere New York e fermare lo spietato costruttore Sig.

programme.title: Nocedicocco: Il piccolo drago
programme.desc: Nocedicocco è un draghetto sputafuoco che non ha ancora imparato a volare e che ha anche qualche problema nello sputare il fuoco. L'unico che ha davvero fiducia in lui è il nonno che lo vede come un se stesso giovane. Gli assegna così un compito di responsabilità...

programme.title: Giotto, l'amico dei pinguini
programme.desc: Giotto è un simpatico cagnolone, un bellissimo e dolcissimo pastore maremmano. Scodinzola per l’incantevole cittadina di Warrnambool, una località sul mare in Australia. Nella fattoria del suo padrone Swampy, ognuno ha il suo compito, e quello di Giotto è di fare la guardia alle galline.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia: Festival of Fun
programme.desc: Unitevi a Barbie e alla sua sorellina Chelsea nel meraviglioso viaggio attraverso il magico mondo di Dreamtopia, una nuova e speciale avventura animata!

programme.title: La Storia Infinita
programme.desc: Tratto dal bestseller mondiale di Michael Ende, "La storia infinita" è l'odissea di un bambino catapultato in un mondo senza tempo popolato da creature fantastiche che solo lui può salvare.

programme.title: Dubitando Di Thomas - Bugie E Spie
programme.desc: Thomas è un ragazzo conosciuto per la sua capacità di raccontare sempre frottole. Quando s’imbatte per sbaglio in un piano per rapire la figlia del Presidente, prova ad allertare le autorità.

programme.title: Robinson Crusoe
programme.desc: La vera storia di Robinson Crusoe raccontata dal pappagallo Venerdì che sull'isola è diventato il suo migliore amico.

programme.title: Il ragazzo e il grande elefante
programme.desc: Da quando entrambi i genitori sono morti, Phoenix viene affidato alla zia Sarah, che vive in Africa con suo marito Jack. Qui rimane subito affascinato dalla natura selvaggia del continente. Durante un safari incontrerà un grande elefante con cui andrà incontro a emozionanti avventure.

programme.title: Arthur e il popolo dei Minimei
programme.desc: Come un qualsiasi altro bambino di 10 anni, Arthur è affascinato dalle storie che sua nonna gli racconta prima di dormire. I suoi sogni sono popolati dalle tribù africane e dalle incredibili altre invenzioni descritte su un vecchio libro che apparteneva a suo nonno, misteriosamente scomparso.

programme.title: Air Bud 5: un amico dal tocco magico
programme.desc: Buddy sta portando il suo show nelle spiaggie grazie ad un nuovo sport: il beach volley! La vita in spiaggia non è così rilassante come sembra. Un'ondata di furti misteriosi ha colpito la città e sono state trovate impronte di zampe sulle scene del crimine.

programme.title: Il fantastico mondo di Aladino
programme.desc: Calvin, un giovane commesso della pizza a domicilio, viene portato nella Bagdad dell'ottavo secolo grazie al Genio della lampada. Qui, con l'aiuto di Alì Babà e della principessa Sherazade, recupererà la lampada di Aladino.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Gargamella crea una Puffetta malvagia per attirare i Puffi nel suo castello. Ma il suo diabolico piano non va come dovrebbe e i Puffi avranno la meglio anche questa volta.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Quattrocchi approfitta dell'assenza di Grande Puffo per tentare di prendere il potere. | Puffo Burlone fa sempre talmente tanti scherzi che nessun Puffo gli crede quando cerca di metterli in guardia da Birda.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: L'Astropuffo costruisce un'astronave perché desidera volare nello spazio e conoscere nuovi mondi, ma l'astronave non parte. Grande Puffo, vedendolo così deluso, decide di organizzare per lui un fantastico "viaggio"…

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: I Puffi trovano nel bosco un piccolo drago malato e lo portano al villaggio per curarlo. Gargamella, però, cattura il drago e decide di utilizzarlo contro i Puffi.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: I Puffi si incamminano verso la montagna della nebbia convinti che lì viva Puffo Stregone, ma una volta arrivati scoprono che ad aspettarli c'è Gargamella. | I Puffi trovano una strana bottiglia in cui vive un genio che esaudirà tre dei loro desideri se i Puffi sapranno dirgli la formula magica.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Il fertilizzante che ha preparato Grande Puffo non funziona come dovrebbe e trasforma un uccellino in un terribile mostro…

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Puffetta ritrova nel bosco il medaglione magico della strega Agata la quale chiede a Gargamella di aiutarla a cercare il prezioso gioiello.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Puffo Inventore vuole conquistare il cuore di Puffetta perciò le regala un paio di occhiali magici che rendono bello tutto ciò che si guarda… | Puffo Sognatore parte alla scoperta del mondo. Grande puffo gli regala un fischietto da utilizzare in caso di bisogno.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Il Gigante Bue Grasso aiuta Gargamella a cercare il villaggio dei Puffi per cucinare un'appetitosa zuppa di Puffo.

programme.title: La Mia Prima Barbie: Felice Giorno da Sogno
programme.desc: Canta insieme a Barbie, Barbie, Teresa e Renee in questa avventura musicale mentre pianificano la più grande festa di compleanno a sorpresa di sempre per la sorella di Barbie, Chelsea. "Più grande di UN SEMPLICE compleanno, dobbiamo pianificare un GIORNO DA SOGNO!"

programme.title: Zip & Zap - Il club delle biglie
programme.desc: Dopo essere stati sorpresi a rubare le risposte del test scolastico, i gemelli Zip e Zap sono costretti per punizione a trascorrere l’estate in un rigido istituto dove è vietato ogni tipo di divertimento.

programme.title: Alpha & Omega
programme.desc: Due giovani lupi in contrasto l'uno con l'altro si trovano a doversi alleare per far fronte alla situazione sfavorevole nella quale sono finiti

programme.title: Dubitando Di Thomas - Bugie E Spie
programme.desc: Thomas è un ragazzo conosciuto per la sua capacità di raccontare sempre frottole. Quando s’imbatte per sbaglio in un piano per rapire la figlia del Presidente, prova ad allertare le autorità.

programme.title: New Rock And Metal Videos For You
programme.desc: Stay ahead of the curve with the freshest drops from the global underground. From world premieres to the latest studio masterpieces, we’ve gathered the newest sonic assaults in one place. If it’s loud and new, it’s here.

programme.title: Together We Rise
programme.desc: A tribute to the global brotherhood that refuses to fit in. This collection celebrates the unity that turns fans into a tribe. In this pit, no one stands alone—together, we are the loudest force on earth.

programme.title: For Metalheads Only
programme.desc: Leave the rock anthems at the door—this is 100% pure steel. We’ve dialed the distortion to eleven for a lineup strictly for the heavy-duty fans. No compromises, no fillers, just total sonic devastation.

programme.title: Metal That Rocks
programme.desc: Where rock 'n' roll swagger meets the weight of metal. This collection bridges the gap, featuring everything from anthemic hard rock to core-shaking classics. It’s loud, it’s proud, and it’s built to move you.

programme.title: Your Pulse Of Metal
programme.desc: Sync your heartbeat to the complex rhythms of the underground. This collection dives into technical mastery and hidden gems that push your adrenaline. If you’re ready to feel the music in your veins, we’ve got the tracks.

programme.title: From The Scene For The Scene
programme.desc: Go beyond the music and into the heart of the underground. This collection pairs heavy-hitting videos with exclusive band interviews and reports from metal capitals worldwide. Built by the scene, for the scene.

programme.title: Night Time Metal
programme.desc: The sun is down, the filters are off, and the real chaos begins. Brace yourself for the raw, uncensored side of the scene too heavy for daylight. This is the unfiltered truth of the underground. Adult ears only.

programme.title: Bay Area Godfathers
programme.desc: Discover the explosive origins of the San Francisco thrash scene. From garage rehearsals to the first club riots, see how bands like Metallica and Exodus ignited a global movement. It’s the raw, untold story of metal's birth.

programme.title: Bay Area Godfathers II
programme.desc: The saga continues as the Bay Area sound conquers the world. Witness the evolution from underground heroes to global icons through exclusive interviews and rare footage. Experience the peak of the thrash metal revolution

programme.title: Finnish Metal Special
programme.desc: From the frozen North comes a sound of haunting melodies and raw intensity. Dive into Finland’s finest, where melancholic atmospheres meet the power of the thousand lakes. It’s a masterclass in darkness and ice-cold riffs.

programme.title: Heavy Pumping
programme.desc: Ditch the pre-workout and let the riffs do the heavy lifting. This high-octane blast of speed and power is designed to fuel your gains or ignite a living room mosh pit. High BPMs, crushing drums, and zero excuses.

programme.title: Una pizza in compagnia
programme.desc: La passione per la pizza di Renato Bosco, una passione curiosa e golosa che lo spinge a cercare nuove contaminazioni e nuove sperimentazioni.

programme.title: Questa terra e' la mia terra
programme.desc: S.4 - Peppe Guida in questa stagione esplora il mondo della cucina regionale. Autodidatta e cultore delle materie prime, è capace di coniugare l'altissima cucina con la semplicità.

programme.title: Mangio tutto tranne Polinesia
programme.desc: Rangiroa - Nella parte più sperduta della Polinesia, Giovanni partecipa ad una battuta di pesca, qui avviene l’incontro con la cucina francese e scopre una cosa inaspettata: un vigneto, forse il più isolato al mondo

programme.title: Parola di chef
programme.desc: Il punto di vista di un giovane talento della ristorazione italiana che si racconta svelando le proprie soddisfazioni, difficoltà, aspirazioni, in un percorso tra pubblico e privato.

programme.title: Beker on tour Veneto
programme.desc: Conogliano Valdobbiadene - Il viaggio di Fabrizio Nonis 'El Beker', il vostro macellaio di fiducia, alla scoperta di cotture, tagli e succose ricette, questa volta arriva in Veneto

programme.title: Come è profondo il mare Capri e Ischia
programme.desc: Capri ep1 - Gianfranco arriva a Capri dove incontra l’amico pescatore Giovanni. Con lui va a pesca dei gamberi che serviranno per la sua ricetta, poi un salto sull’isola per assaggiare i piatti del ristorante di Gennaro Amitrano

programme.title: Oltre il mare: Il mio viaggio in Toscana
programme.desc: Greve in Chianti - Giuseppe Carrus continua il suo viaggio questa volta alla scoperta delle cantine più importanti e rappresentative della Toscana. Tra colline e vigneti uno sguardo appassionato verso le realtà vitivinicole di questa regione.

programme.title: Il guusto di Igles
programme.desc: S15 - Il gambero rosso di Porto Santo Spirito, utilizzato da Igles per un minestrone insolito al sapore di gambero e per una polenta con i gamberi.

programme.title: Max alla brace
programme.desc: S.1 - Max Mariola in cortile alle prese con un bbq. Ricette gustose e originali da realizzare nel giardino di casa o per passare qualche ora all’aperto

programme.title: Giorgione orto e cucina Duino Aurisina
programme.desc: Il viaggio di Giorgione alla ricerca degli ingredienti per le sue ricette continua nella splendida cornice di Duino Aurisina

programme.title: Vito con i suoi S7
programme.desc: Uova con asparagi - Non mancano le risate nella cucina di Vito. Lorenzo cerca di cimentarsi nella preparazione di una ricetta con gli asparagi. Ma è difficile rimanere concentrati quando si è in casa Bicocchi.

programme.title: Una pizza in compagnia
programme.desc: La passione per la pizza di Renato Bosco, una passione curiosa e golosa che lo spinge a cercare nuove contaminazioni e nuove sperimentazioni.

programme.title: Fuoco Calabria

programme.title: BLITZ!
programme.desc: BLITZ! is an all-new cooking show! Imagine being next to Eva Chin as they cook their fav dishes!

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.desc: A modest budget inspires bold ideas as just twenty five dollars stretches into satisfying, flavor-packed griddle meals. Simple ingredients are transformed with imagination and skill, proving that good food doesn’t have to come with a high price tag.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.desc: The rich heritage of hibachi meets modern griddle artistry. Dive into the origins of teppan-style cooking while exploring new sauces, sizzling techniques, and flavor-packed innovations that bring restaurant-style magic to the home griddle.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.desc: Morning meals take center stage as griddles bring new energy to breakfast classics. Pancakes, bacon, and hash browns transform with bold ideas from home kitchens, turning the first meal of the day into something truly special.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Warm host Jessica McGovern offers up some do-it-yourself recipes that will spice up any wedding.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Cheerful host Vijaya Selvaraju shows us how to DIY some of the important staples of Indian cuisine.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.desc: Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks her way from Monday to Friday with four delicious dishes, including a Roast Beef feast and velvety Earl Grey Pudding.

programme.title: Up the Dish
programme.desc: In this episode of Up the Dish, steal away to Spain for a summer vacation as host Tiera Singh takes a swing at Paella, complete with sunny saffron, saucy sofrito, and super crunchy soccarat. Next, Missy Hui takes a break for brunch with Chorizo Eggs Benedict - the Saffron Hollandaise is good as gold and twice as bright! Poppy Sandler follows with her Fritto Misto and Sofrito, a delicate and fresh veggie fry-up that soaks up a tomato-spiked sofrito dipping sauce. Micah Trainor finishes up with restaurant-ready Razor Clams steamed in sparkling Spanish wine, served alongside nutty Iberico Ham and sweet Manchego cheese.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: It's all about the letter "S" as Chef Robert Jewell cooks up tasty meals using shrimp and sausage. For his first recipe, Robert fries up turmeric-spiced sweet potato fritters with a shrimp centre. He takes this tantalizing appetizer to another level with a savoury lime soy dipping sauce. Next up, Robert makes an English breakfast strata. This sausage casserole is easily the BEST way to start your day. He layers the bottom of the dish with buttered sourdough slices, before adding crispy fried sausages, leeks and tomatoes. He then covers it in a creamy egg mixture, crumbles stilton on top and bakes it to golden brown. Finally, Robert combines shrimp and sausage into one flavourful dish.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Miso is an extremely common ingredient in Japanese cuisine. Host Hana Etsuko Dethlefsen shows us how miso can add flavour and richness to any dish.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: A Moroccan meal in 30 minutes? That's right! Spencer Watts inspires with Moroccan dishes that are quick to make and bold in flavour.

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.desc: Join engaging host, Bianca Osbourne, for a taste of two countries. First stop? Italy! Check out her recipe for succulent wild boar ribs, braised until tender, rolled in gremolata, and served over silky polenta. Next up? A culinary tribute to China, pairing lobster claw with chili oil, pomelo foam, and oyster sauce glazed bok choy. Every episode features a 'common ingredient', this time? It's noodles! Drool over two recipes: Italian classic Olio e Aglio next to chewy Chinese long Noodles tossed with Sichuan Chili Oil. For the big finale, Bianca blends Italian style with Chinese flavour for a one-of-a-kind CombiNation Plate: Kung Pao Pork Osso Bucco over Forbidden Black Rice Risotto... made...

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.desc: Turkey, think Silk Road spices. Indonesia, lots of seafood and tropical fruits! Curious and adventurous host Bianca Osbourne is your CombiNATION Plates culinary guide through both food cultures. First, check out Turkish Spice Crusted Lamb Rack with yogurt and blistered peppers. Next, an Indonesian tribute: Crab Leg with Coconut Curry. For the 'common ingredient'? Two takes on tender, savoury eggplant! Turkish Eggplant is braised and served with parsley and feta and the Indonesian take is served with fried garlic and sweet soy. For the CombiNATION Plate? Peanut- chili Sate sauce replaces walnut for Pazili TrancÌ§a, a classically Turkish halibut presentation, also served here with unique,...

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.desc: From Canada to Greece, CombiNATION Plates always covers lots of ground! Kicking off, host Bianca Osbourne wows with ubERS-Canadian Roasted Venison Loin, yummy Fiddlehead Pancakes and sweet-tart Cranberry sauce. Next, enjoy a scenic Mediterranean vacation on a plate with her completely new approach to Greek Salad, taken up a notch or two with tasty seared Albacore Tuna! This episode's 'common ingredient' is lamb shank; check out two wildly creative re- inventions; first, of Canadian TourtieÌ€re, and then, Greek Dolmades. For a final recipe, a dessert fit for a lumberjack or a Greek god! Oka Saganaki with McIntosh Apple Butter and Maple Loukoumades; made with nutty Canadian Oka cheese,...

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.desc: In this episode of CombiNATION Plates, host Bianca Osbourne starts in Mexico with her version of popular street snack, 'Esquites', re-invented here as sweet corn flan. Next is Norway, don't miss explosively exciting quick-smoked Arctic Char with Forage, you've NEVER seen anything like this before. The common ingredient is tacos! From Norway, 'Lefse' is a potato-flour 'tortilla' served with fresh berries and uniquely Scandinavian 'Brunost' cheese. Representing Mexico, check out spicy pork and pineapple 'Tacos al Pastor'. The Big Dish is Lamb Pinnekjott with Birch Bark Tamale, lamb ribs are seasoned, birch bark is stuffed with masa and veggies, both are steamed over birch branches and boozy...

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Grill master Spencer Watts shows us four ways to barbeque a classic. Succulent, tender, mouth-watering ribs.

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make an East Coast-inspired meal for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: clam chowder, shrimp rolls, a simple salad, and blueberry cobbler!

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make a meal using leftovers for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: panzanella salad, stuffed peppers, cheese fondue, and chocolate banana crostini!

programme.title: Flour Power Spring Specials
programme.desc: An ode to Sunshine and Showers, this delectable Flour Power spring themed special inspires with three deliciously creative desserts. Charming host Jessica McGovern shows that spring showers bring decadent treats such as toasted hazelnut Mud Puddle Cookies and adorable Flower Pot Cupcakes that are sure to rejuvenate and bring new life to your kitchen!

programme.title: Flour Power Spring Specials
programme.desc: Coffee klatch is an old-fashioned tradition of gathering with your friends for coffee and conversation. In this sweet half-hour special, charming host Jessica McGovern pays tribute to this custom with three decadent and impressive desserts made with fragrant coffee

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.desc: Join Bianca Osbourne to taste and combine! Fun CombiNATION Plates host Bianca Osbourne starts this episode with an inspired tribute to Georgian cuisine; Beef Tartare with Tkemali (sour plum sauce), marigold powder, and tart, crunchy pickles. Next; feast your eyes on her unique Hong Kong dumpling: plump scallops, pork, and veggies are blended, rolled, steamed, sliced, and then served with Crispy Yu Choy and XO. The common ingredient is rabbit! Georgia offers up Rabbit 'Mtsvadi', grilled and glazed with pomegranate reduction. Hong Kong represents with Sweet and Sour Rabbit, Grilled Pineapple and Red Pepper Coulis. Finally, Georgian Milk Braised meets Chinese/Hong Kong-style Roast Duck with...

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.desc: CombiNATION Plates host Bianca Osbourne is always looking for the best food in the world to share. The first stop is South Korea with her Sesame Crusted Tuna 'Yukhoe', a delicious blend of favourite Korean flavours. Next stamp on the passport? Spain! Mouth-watering Duck Breast is seared and served rare with a crispy artichoke heart, membrillo, olives, and sweet-savoury sherry reduction. Beef short ribs are the common ingredient with Catalonian Braised and Romesco to one side and sticky Korean Kalbi-style grilled to the east! For the topper, drool over Bulgogi Octopus simmered and served with saffron-scented Sticky Rice Paella cakes, finished with crispy Paprika-Gochujang battered mussel....

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.desc: Travel the world without ever leaving the kitchen! Intrepid host of CombiNATION Plates, Bianca Osbourne, starts this episode with Ethiopian inspired Berbere Spiced Quail, seared in aromatic Niter Kibbeh, and served with crunchy-sour Gomen Salad. Brazil is next, check out this re- invention of Feijoada... with braised and seared pork belly, oranges, crema, and fresh black bean salsa. Common ingredient 'Coffee and Sweets' is next... with java-spiked Injera Crepe Cake for Ethiopia and Brazil blending up a dark roast of rich, coffee-spiked, chocolatey Brigadeiros truffles. The final plate is Coconut Crusted Black Cod with cheesy Brazilian-style Pao de Queijo bites, and teff flour a brush of...

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.desc: Join CombiNATION Plates host Bianca Osbourne for a trip to Morocco and Thailand! First up, whole Red Snapper is rubbed with earthy Ras el Hanout spice, poached in argan oil, and served with char-grilled oranges. Thailand inspires the next plate; Chicken Thigh 'Lollipop', roasted and served with bamboo shoots, chilies, and sauced with peanut-coconut red curry. Next, these countries both love Spring Rolls... Morocco's version, Briouat, is stuffed with saffron couscous and fresh cheese and fried... from Thailand comes a salad roll with shrimp and mango, dipped in a fiery green Nam Jim. Stick around for the big dish - Saffron buttERS-basted beef Striploin, served with complex Apricot-Green...

programme.desc: Riflettori puntati sugli eventi più glamour e importanti di tutto il lifestyle system, raccontati attraverso interviste esclusive

programme.title: Class tv moda stories
programme.desc: Una copertura speciale e completa sulle fiere di settore (Pitti Immagine, Salone del Mobile, Vicenzaoro, Micam, Mipel, ecc.)

programme.title: Flying Over Bermuda
programme.desc: Soar over Bermuda, a voyage that explores lush land and turquoise waters.

programme.title: Thermal Wonderland: New Zealand
programme.desc: Free from rabbit holes but still full of magic, Waiotapu Thermal Wonderland has an impressive geothermal landscape.

programme.title: New Zealand Gardens
programme.desc: The filmmaker explores the breath-taking gardens of New Zealand and provides the diversity and beauty of these enchanting havens.

programme.title: Rainbow Reef Relaxation 1
programme.desc: Vibrant underwater reefs, including many scenes which no longer look as depicted due to coral bleaching.

programme.title: Blue Horizons
programme.desc: Featuring a diverse set of blue nature scenes from places like Hawaii, Mexico, Canada and California paired with a custom ambient track by Travis Revell.

programme.title: Wonders of New Zealand
programme.desc: A 4K UHD ambient nature film which showcases the beauty of New Zealand's South Island with ambient real-life nature sounds.

programme.title: Earth From Above
programme.desc: Traveling the world with a birds-eye-view perspective of scenic wonders.

programme.title: Crystal Waterfalls of Croatia
programme.desc: The Plitvice Lakes National Park.

programme.title: Garden of Eden
programme.desc: Discover the world's natural beauty with flowers, butterflies, and waterfalls.

programme.title: Atuh Beach: Indonesia
programme.desc: Take a tour of beautiful Indonesian waters, surrounded by impressive rock formations.

programme.title: Nature's Beauty: World of Relaxation
programme.desc: Scenes from over 100 different exotic, natural destinations around the world; a seamless, graciously flowing mix of several Nature Relaxation shorter length productions, designed to keep you in a state of complete relaxation from start to finish; transitioning you from golden sunsets to snowy mountaintops; from hidden canyon waterfalls to tropical islands so pure you've likely never seen anything like it!

programme.title: Date With Nature
programme.desc: Photographers capture the serenity of a lakeside paradise, navigating the shores, revealing the secrets of aquatic life and how the light shines upon the water's surface.

programme.title: A Day in Paradise
programme.desc: Filmed in 2013 by David Huting, the tiny island is hidden off of the northeastern coast of the outer Fiji Islands (near Taveuni), and boasts a perfect white sandy beach, groves of palm trees, and a majestic lagoon that shelters the island from all sides. It has more turtle visitors than humans!

programme.title: Yellow Wildflowers: France
programme.desc: In the French region of Dordogne, a field of yellow wildflowers grows as far as the eye can see.

programme.title: Tiny House by the Coast: Îles de la Madeleine
programme.desc: The filmmaker captures the beauty of a tiny lone house on Îles de la Madeleine, Quebec; the filmmaker illuminates the serenity and pristine environment of the region they belong to.

programme.title: Glacial Beauty: Newfoundland
programme.desc: Admiring the quiet and glacial beauty of icebergs drifting across the bay at Newfoundland's Amherst Cove.

programme.title: Dolphin Voyage Relaxation
programme.desc: Underwater cinematography, a synergistic blend of audio including underwater nature sounds, and calming ambient music combine to induce relaxtion in the deep blue calming ocean with a pod of friendly dolphins.

programme.title: A Day on the Napali Coast
programme.desc: An ambient nature film features the sights and sounds of the 11-mile Kalalau Trail on the Hawaiian island of Kauai.

programme.title: Yosemite Magic: Yosemite National Park
programme.desc: Yosemite is known all over the world for its granite cliffs, waterfalls, and giant sequoias.

programme.title: Glistening Island Beach
programme.desc: A big palm tree facing a white sandy beach, glistening blue sea, sunshine, and a small boat; filmed in 4K Ultra High Definition on the hidden island of Nanuku, where a small atoll is surrounded by an untouched lagoon, miles away from it all.

programme.title: Beautiful Backcountry: Yukon River
programme.desc: The Yukon River snakes a path through the evergreen wilderness.

programme.title: Atuh Beach: Indonesia
programme.desc: Take a tour of beautiful Indonesian waters, surrounded by impressive rock formations.

programme.title: Crashing Waves: Hawaii
programme.desc: The energizing sound of waves crashing on the shores of Hawaii's Red Sand Beach.

programme.title: Diamond Beach I: Indonesia
programme.desc: An immersion into turquoise waters and a rocky coastline in Bali, Indonesia.

programme.title: Fly Over Earth
programme.desc: Footage of scenic destinations.

programme.title: Spring in California
programme.desc: The vibrant spring coastlines and valleys of California, as seen during spring bloom.

programme.title: Nusa Penida: Indonesia
programme.desc: A bird's eye view of Nusa Penida.

programme.title: Shark Paradise
programme.desc: Captured by filmmaker collaborator Peter Schneider, Shark Paradise features hundreds of unique real-time scenes captured from around the world, paired with gentle underwater sounds and calming music for deep relaxation by Relax Moods.

programme.title: Nacpan Beach
programme.desc: Travelling to a beautiful stretch of cream-colored sand with swaying coconut palms and clear waters.

programme.title: A Day in Big Sur 2
programme.desc: The beautiful Big Sur coast of California from a unique perspective.

programme.title: Fly Over Spectacular Sights: Indonesia
programme.desc: A bird's-eye view of Indonesia's spectacular scenery.

programme.title: Gentle Creek: British-Columbia
programme.desc: Admire the twin summits, lush valley, and sparkling creek of Golden Ears Provincial Park in British-Columbia.

programme.title: Cascading waterfall: Indonesia
programme.desc: Take a trip through the Indonesian jungle to a remote waterfall cascading over a natural cave.

programme.title: Cape Reinga & Giant Sand Dunes: New Zealand
programme.desc: Experiencing a waterfall flowing down a forest wall, surrounded by overgrown vines.

programme.title: Pantai Ngopet: Indonesia
programme.desc: Discover the awe-inspiring waters of Indonesia with a tour of various vacation-worthy spots.

programme.title: Disappearing Beauty
programme.desc: From awe-inspiring wildlife to unbelievable landscapes, lose yourself in this compilation of mind-soothing footage-an ode to our planet's fleeting natural wonders.

programme.title: Barracuda Lake, Philippines
programme.desc: Immerse yourself in the calm green waters of this unique lake in the Philippines, interspersed by lush coasts.

programme.title: A Day in Santorini
programme.desc: A visual journey through the coastal village of Oia, found on the far tip of Santorini Island.

programme.title: Tropical Weightlessness
programme.desc: Gently sway in the tropical turquoise waters with a glimpse of blue sky and palm trees.

programme.title: Whats On Mediterranean Cultural Mosaic
programme.desc: From Malta to Greece, Mediterranean arts flourish. Valletta Baroque Festival, Malta International Arts Festival, and Birgu by Candlelight light up the island with music and heritage. Italy Cortona on the Move, La Fenice in Piazza San Marco, and Mercantia Festival showcase photography, opera, and street performance. France Art Paris and International Garden Festival, Spain Revelat Festival and La Leyenda de Tartessos, Portugal Umbrella Sky Project and Walk and Talk Biennale, Turkey Istanbul Theatre Festival and Biennial, and Greece Athens Epidaurus Festival highlight the Med rich artistic tapestry.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: For many travelers, the quintessence of Spain is found in Andalucía. Join us in Granada, Córdoba, and the Costa del Sol as we enjoy the food, history, art, and dance of Europe's most passionate corner.

programme.title: Whats On Lights, Cinema, Mediterranean
programme.desc: The Mediterranean screens its stories this week. Malta hosts the Mediterranean Film Festival, while Italy Venice Film Festival and Med Film Festival bring glamour and regional storytelling to iconic locations. France Cannes Film Festival shines globally, Spain International Fantastic Film Festival of Catalonia celebrates genre cinema, and Morocco Amazigh Film Festival showcases North African voices. Turkey Adana Golden Boll Film Festival and Croatia Zagreb Film Festival round out a cinematic journey across the Med.

programme.title: Med Destinations Crete
programme.desc: Med Destinations takes you to Crete, the jewel of the Greek islands, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. Explore charming villages, hidden beaches, and the vibrant local culture that makes Crete a must-visit Mediterranean paradise.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Lisbon
programme.desc: Malini Angelica explores Lisbon, the vibrant capital of Portugal. Once founded by the Phoenicians and shaped by Romans, Moors, and explorers of the Golden Age, Lisbon’s layered history is reflected in its culture and charm. During her visit, the city comes alive with the Festas Populares de Lisboa — a June celebration of Saint Anthony filled with music, dancing, and barbecued sardines. Malini samples local favorites like grilled sardines, bifanas, and the famous pastel de nata, and experiences the soulful beauty of Fado music. Lisbon’s warmth, flavor, and festive spirit show why it remains one of Europe’s most beloved cities.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Discover the wonders of southern France as we savor Roman ruins in Nîmes, a papal palace in Avignon, Van Gogh's vivid views in Arles, and the vineyards of the Côtes du Rhône.

This trip shows how Greece still inspires the Mediterranean and the world through its food, music, and long history.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: The spotlight falls on two traditional Cypriot favorites. First, we explore the art of preparing Oven Lamb Kleftiko, a slow-cooked dish where tender lamb is infused with herbs and baked to perfection, capturing the essence of village cooking. Then, the journey continues with Kattimeria, fried sweet flatbreads that balance crisp texture with a hint of indulgent sweetness. Together, these recipes showcase the comforting richness and variety of Cyprus’s culinary heritage.

programme.title: Vivi e lascia vivere
programme.desc: Laura faces mounting pressure as she juggles her secret past with her new business, while her children begin to suspect she’s hiding something. Toni reappears, bringing old emotions and new dangers that threaten her fresh start. As conflicts rise, Laura must navigate between protecting her family and confronting her past. Meanwhile, a shocking revelation forces her to make a life-altering decision.

programme.title: Scelte difficili
programme.desc: Olivia finally has her feelings clear, but a shadow from her past looms over her life and puts her in crisis. Meanwhile, Eros is in total panic because Martina has discovered her secret and doesn't know what to do. The twins have quarrelled so much that they share the bedroom, but they don't know that unexpected news awaits them soon.

programme.title: Concerto - Schubert e Strauss per Mariotti e OSN
programme.desc: The Rai National Symphony Orchestra, under the baton of conductor Michele Mariotti, presents a captivating performance featuring the works of Franz Schubert and Richard Strauss. The programme showcases Schubert's rich melodies and lyrical compositions alongside Strauss's dynamic and expressive pieces, offering a journey through the Romantic and late-Romantic musical landscapes. The orchestra's interpretation highlights the depth and emotional power of these renowned composers, creating a memorable concert experience.

programme.title: Blockchain in Real Estate Panel
programme.desc: As blockchain moves from theory to practice, this panel examines its growing role in real estate. Speakers unpack how decentralised systems are changing transactions, ownership records, and trust, while addressing the challenges of regulation, scalability, and industry readiness in today’s market.

programme.title: Acqua da proteggere
programme.desc: With Marco Faimali, director of the CNR's Institute for the Study of Marine Sustainability, we explore the ocean's fragile ecosystem and the need for protection. Anna Pancaldi visits marine protected areas, including the Smart Bay of Santa Teresa and the port of La Spezia, where researchers study "alien species". Finally, we learn about the underwater internet, an innovation from Sapienza University of Rome led by Professor Chiara Petrioli and the WSENSE team.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
